metadata.title: Pratibha Dhingra | Full Stack Engineer
metadata.description: Full Stack Engineer with 3.5+ years of experience designing and shipping end-to-end products using MERN, Python/FastAPI, and React Native, with AI integrations using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and LangGraph orchestration on AWS.

hero.name: Pratibha Dhingra
hero.title: Full Stack Engineer
hero.description: 3.5+ years designing and shipping end-to-end products — MERN and React Native frontends to Python/FastAPI APIs and AWS cloud infrastructure. AI integrations with LLMs, RAG pipelines, and LangGraph orchestration.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Building scalable mobile & AI
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Engineer with over 3.5 years of experience designing and shipping end-to-end products using MERN (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js), Python/FastAPI, and React Native, spanning web, iOS, and Android platforms. I work across the entire stack — database design, RESTful API development, and cloud deployment on AWS.
about.paragraph2: I have hands-on experience integrating AI-powered features using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and LangGraph orchestration, with a track record of improving system performance through strategic caching and query optimization. I own projects end-to-end, from architecture through production deployment and CI/CD.

items.institution: S.S. Jain Subodh Autonomous P.G. College
S.S. Jain Subodh Mahila Mahavidhyalaya College

items.description: Delivered product features end-to-end across web and mobile, working across MERN (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js), React Native, and Python/FastAPI stacks. Developed FastAPI and Express.js endpoints for concurrent request handling; integrated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and AWS (ECS, ECR, RDS) for automated deployments. Optimized queries across MongoDB and PostgreSQL through strategic indexing and Redis caching, reducing API latency by an estimated 20% and database load by 15%.

Built MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) web applications, developing frontend components and backend REST APIs with database optimization, improving system performance through query and component tuning.

Cloud & DevOps.label: #0891b2
items: AWS (ECS, ECR, RDS, S3, Lambda, CloudWatch, Amplify)

items.title: Route AI
items.description: AI-driven logistics routing platform for commercial truck drivers, integrating HERE Maps, Google Routes, and Gemini 2.5 Pro APIs for real-time, compliant route rendering. Containerized the FastAPI backend with Docker on AWS ECS/EC2, and integrated OpenAI for permit document parsing and dynamic route restriction computation.

items.title: SweatJoy
items.description: Live fitness and wellness iOS app built with React Native, featuring Apple In-App Purchases, Google/Apple Sign-In, custom deep linking, and secure payment processing. Python backend syncs signup/login data to Zoho CRM, with personalized meal tracking via local caching and real-time sync.

items.title: BizBot
items.description: AI-powered enterprise organization chatbot deployed across custom cloud microservices, reducing document retrieval timelines by 40% with optimized PostgreSQL indexing and Redis caching.

items.title: WorthAdvisor
items.description: End-to-end financial reporting platform serving 200+ production users with multi-role access control (client, employee, admin) across web and mobile (Ionic). Architected a Node.js–Python bridge with LangGraph workflow orchestration and AWS Bedrock, implementing a RAG pipeline with client-scoped data isolation and Redis-optimized query performance.
